channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead Fox outside 7 Foxbury Close, 24th July
item.description:
Young fox has died. Looks as if it had an injury. Seen sheltering under a car. Died a few minutes ago, at about 3:30 on 24/7/2026.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxbury Close, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From Welling High Street to Bellgrove Road MacDonalds, 24th July
item.description:
The pavements need a thorough clean. The pavements need jet washing. It is generally not being maintained. Please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car for sale not moving, 24th July
item.description:
Blue ‘07 Peugeot has been parked here for weeks and being used as an advertisements for selling used cars. Taking up a parking space that is much needed on this busy road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping old furniture, 24th July
item.description:
Fly tipping old furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rippolson Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress left on pavement, 24th July
item.description:
So one has dumped a large mattress at the Chaton Station exit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delafield Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree obstructing the path, 24th July
item.description:
There is a tree and bush outside my house which is so over grown it is obstructing and blocking the pavement. It would be great if the council could come and chop it right back to allow a free flow of pedestrians on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Blackwater Street, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Verges overgrown, 24th July
item.description:
The verges are overgrown

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes left across pavement, 24th July
item.description:
2 lime bikes have been thrown from a vehicle across the pavement outside no 29 Delafield Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Delafield Road, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in the whole park area, 24th July
item.description:
The park is covered in litter throughout the entire area. It has been in this condition for at least a week, and the amount of rubbish is making the park unpleasant for visitors. In addition, there is broken glass at the park entrance. This was reported at the beginning of July, but it is still there and has not been cleared. The broken glass poses a safety risk, particularly for children, dogs, and other park users. I would appreciate it if both the litter throughout the park and the broken glass at the entrance could be addressed as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radial Path, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping on Cresswell Park, 24th July
item.description:
This time builders rubble (possibly from the building work going on in old Lloyd’s Bank or the Chip shop both of which are being refurbished

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cresswell Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This has been dumped in front by our fence., 24th July
item.description:
This is not the first time as it has happened and we’ve had to clear - this is not neighbourly at all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mosul Way, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th July
item.description:
Rubbish fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smithies Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds all along Beal Close Wellng 26 - 30, 24th July
item.description:
The weeds all around Beal Close in Welling are extremely overgrown and residents are frightened about falling over them. Please can this be looked at with a matter of urgency. Particularly between 26 - 30
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beal Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LArge blue platic bags filled with waste oil???, 24th July
item.description:
Someone keeps dumping their waste oil (I think that's what it is) in our car park behind my car. Please can this be removed. It is in the corner of the car park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti at bus stop shelter outside 23 Brixton road residential flats., 24th July
item.description:
I like to report graffiti written on a bus stop shelter outside number 23 residential flats on Brixton Road SW9. The graffiti is done with a thick white marker directly onto the glass its of a face. The graffiti has been there for two months. Please can the graffiti be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knowle Close, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned, untaxed van left on street, 24th July
item.description:
This van appeared here about five to six weeks ago and has not moved since. The tyres are flat and it seems abandoned alongside a pallet of concrete left on the pavement. Reg is CV11 BXC

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Cleve Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large black bin bag of rotting food, 24th July
item.description:
It has been there for at least 3 days. Someone needs to remove it. 3rd floor Burtt House
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aske Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open panel on luminated traffic sign., 24th July
item.description:
Open panel on luminated traffic sign by livermoors estates
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roman Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish near number 1 Battery Road and, 24th July
item.description:
Rubbish bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by metal fence, 24th July
item.description:
House hold belongings left by the bins for over a month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50-84, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
